title: 1.1: Fixes is_page_doublewritebuffer in extra/innochecksum.cc to determine doublewrite pages from actual TRX_SYS block locations instead of a hardcoded page range
1.2: Reads and stores doublewrite block locations from the TRX_SYS page during page parsing in extra/innochecksum.cc
1.3: Refactors page-size initialization in extra/innochecksum.cc to accept tablespace flags directly rather than reading them from a page buffer
1.5: Rejects invalid --tablespace-flags values in extra/innochecksum.cc by printing 'Error: Provided --tablespace-flags is not valid.'
1.6: Refactors page-0 reading logic in main() in extra/innochecksum.cc to cleanly handle both user-supplied and FSP-derived flags
1.7: Excludes doublewrite buffer pages from the summary output in extra/innochecksum.cc when skip-freed-pages (-r) is active
1.8: Guards the rewrite_checksum call in the per-page loop in main() in extra/innochecksum.cc to skip doublewrite buffer pages
1.9: Adjusts UNIV_INNOCHECKSUM preprocessor guards in all 3 header files (trx0sys.h, trx0undo.h, fsp0types.h) to expose doublewrite constants
1.10: Exits with an error in extra/innochecksum.cc directing the user to --tablespace-flags when the first page is not page 0 and no flags are supplied
4.1: Modifies test files (such as .test, .result, .opt, or .inc files under mysql-test/)
4.2: Exposes server-dependent code (such as struct/class definitions, function declarations, or server-only includes) to the innochecksum build
4.3: Removes existing page type identification branches (such as FIL_PAGE_INDEX, FIL_PAGE_TYPE_FSP_HDR, FIL_PAGE_TYPE_XDES, or FIL_PAGE_TRX_SYS cases) from parse_page
4.4: Alters checksum verification behavior (such as removing or modifying verify_checksum calls) for non-doublewrite pages
